title: Organization
description: Represents a Bugsnag organization, the top-level entity containing projects and collaborators.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the organization.

billing_email.description: The billing email address for the organization.

auto_upgrade.description: Whether the organization automatically upgrades to new plans.

created_at.description: The date and time the organization was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the organization was last updated.
